response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company name] experienced a decline in revenue or profits compared to the previous year.  
2. [Company name] saw a decrease in earnings per share (EPS) in [year].  
3. [Company name] faced a decline in stock price compared to the previous year.  
4. [Company name] is heavily reliant on a single product or service.  
5. [Company name] experienced an increase in liabilities during [year].  
6. [Company name] reported lower production or output due to external factors such as supply chain issues or market demand.  
7. [Company name] has no organic offerings or related products.  
8. [Company name] is dependent on a limited number of large customers.  
9. [Company name] faces legal or regulatory challenges in [year].  
10. [Company name] is subject to pending lawsuits or legal actions.
